page.title: Agent Tools
page.description: Enable or disable the built-in tools the agent can call at runtime.

table.title: Built-in tools
table.alertDescription: Tool definitions, schemas, and executors still live in the backend. This page only decides which tools are allowed in the agent runtime.

searchProducts.label: Search products
searchProducts.description: Search and filter SmartMall products by keyword, category, price range, rating, stock, and sort order.

getProductDetail.label: Product details
getProductDetail.description: Get details for a specific product. Prefer the slug from searchProducts results; otherwise use the product name.

checkProductAvailability.label: Check stock
checkProductAvailability.description: Quickly check stock availability for one or more products, optionally with requested quantity.

compareProducts.label: Compare products
compareProducts.description: Compare 2-4 products by price, stock, rating, sales, discount, and feature signals.

checkOrderStatus.label: Check order status
checkOrderStatus.description: Check an order by order ID. Use when customers ask about order status, delivery, or payment.

listMyOrders.label: My orders
listMyOrders.description: Get the customer's recent orders while they are signed in, with optional status filtering.

getOrderDetail.label: Order details
getOrderDetail.description: Get the details of one order for a signed-in customer by orderId or order code.

getOrderInvoice.label: Order invoice/receipt
getOrderInvoice.description: Get the invoice or receipt link for an order. If no generated file exists, return the order detail link and instructions for saving it as a receipt.

reorderPreviousOrder.label: Reorder previous order
reorderPreviousOrder.description: Create a new payment order from products in a previous order. Requires clear customer confirmation.

trackOrderByCode.label: Track by code
trackOrderByCode.description: Track an order by its code and the phone number used at checkout.

cancelOrder.label: Cancel order
cancelOrder.description: Cancel a pending order for the signed-in customer. This is dangerous and requires clear confirmation.

updateOrderAddress.label: Update order address
updateOrderAddress.description: Update the delivery address on a signed-in customer's pending order. Requires clear confirmation.

updateOrderContact.label: Update order contact
updateOrderContact.description: Update the phone number, email, or notes on a signed-in customer's pending order. Requires clear confirmation.

updatePendingOrderItems.label: Update pending order items
updatePendingOrderItems.description: Update products or quantities on a signed-in customer's unpaid pending order. Requires clear confirmation.

checkPaymentStatus.label: Check payment status
checkPaymentStatus.description: Check whether an order is pending, paid, failed, or expired for VNPay, MoMo, ZaloPay, and Sepay payments.

resumePayment.label: Resume payment
resumePayment.description: Create a fresh payment link for a signed-in customer's pending order. Supports VNPay, MoMo, ZaloPay, and Sepay instructions.

getBankInfo.label: Bank transfer info
getBankInfo.description: Get the active bank account and transfer QR. If a pending order is provided, also returns the amount and required transfer content.

verifyBankTransfer.label: Verify bank transfer
verifyBankTransfer.description: Check whether a bank transfer/Sepay payment has been recorded by orderCode or paymentReference.

getFlashSales.label: Flash sale
getFlashSales.description: Get the list of products currently on discount.

getAvailablePromoCodes.label: Available promo codes
getAvailablePromoCodes.description: Get public or customer-specific promo codes that are still valid and have remaining usage.

checkPromoCode.label: Validate promo code
checkPromoCode.description: Check whether a promo code is still valid for the current customer. If subtotal is provided, estimate the discount.

getVipBenefits.label: VIP benefits
getVipBenefits.description: Get VIP Membership/SmartMall Plus content, including benefits, membership plans, comparison rows, and FAQ.

getLoyaltyStatus.label: Loyalty status
getLoyaltyStatus.description: View the signed-in customer's points, current member tier, and progress toward the next tier.

getCart.label: View cart
getCart.description: Get the current customer's cart, including items, quantities, backend-calculated prices, and subtotal.

addToCart.label: Add to cart
addToCart.description: Add a product to the current customer's cart. Use only when the customer wants to add or keep it in the cart; for direct purchase requests, use Place order.

updateCartQuantity.label: Update cart quantity
updateCartQuantity.description: Update the quantity of a product already in the cart.

removeFromCart.label: Remove from cart
removeFromCart.description: Remove a product from the current customer's cart.

applyPromoCodeToCart.label: Apply promo to cart
applyPromoCodeToCart.description: Apply and save a valid promo code to the current customer's cart.

validateCart.label: Validate cart
validateCart.description: Check whether the current cart has out-of-stock items, over-limit quantities, changed prices, or an invalid promo code.

removePromoCodeFromCart.label: Remove promo code from cart
removePromoCodeFromCart.description: Clear the promo code currently being considered for the cart and return the cart without promo validation.

getCheckoutProfile.label: Default checkout profile
getCheckoutProfile.description: Get the current customer's saved checkout details, including contact information, address, delivery method, and payment method.

getDeliveryOptions.label: Delivery options
getDeliveryOptions.description: Get available pickup/delivery methods, ETA, and fee estimates when available for a product, cart, or subtotal.

getUserProfile.label: Customer profile
getUserProfile.description: Read the signed-in customer's basic profile, including username, full name, email, phone, avatar, and account status.

requestPasswordReset.label: Request password reset
requestPasswordReset.description: Send a password reset code or instructions by email after customer confirmation. Never change passwords directly in chat.

getNotificationPreferences.label: Notification preferences
getNotificationPreferences.description: Read the customer's notification preferences, including channels and order, payment, promotion, restock, wishlist, and support topics.

updateUserProfile.label: Update customer profile
updateUserProfile.description: Update the signed-in customer's basic profile fields such as full name, phone, or avatar. Requires clear confirmation.

requestEmailChange.label: Request email OTP
requestEmailChange.description: Send an OTP to the customer's new email address. This does not update the email yet.

verifyEmailChange.label: Verify email change
verifyEmailChange.description: Verify the OTP and update the account email. Do not use updateUserProfile for email changes.

requestAccountDeletion.label: Request account deletion
requestAccountDeletion.description: Create an account deletion request ticket for the signed-in customer. Requires confirmation and does not delete the account immediately in chat.

updateCheckoutProfile.label: Update checkout profile
updateCheckoutProfile.description: Save or edit the current customer's default checkout details. This writes account data and requires clear customer confirmation.

updateNotificationPreferences.label: Update notifications
updateNotificationPreferences.description: Save the customer's notification preferences. This writes account data and requires clear customer confirmation.

placeOrder.label: Place order
placeOrder.description: Create a pending payment order from the cart or selected products after the customer clearly confirms. Only supports online payment through VNPay, MoMo, or ZaloPay.

clearCart.label: Clear cart
clearCart.description: Clear the current customer's entire cart. Only execute after the customer clearly confirms.

getWishlist.label: View wishlist
getWishlist.description: Get the current customer's wishlist, including product names, prices, stock, links, and pagination.

addToWishlist.label: Add to wishlist
addToWishlist.description: Add a product to the current customer's wishlist. Use when the customer wants to save, revisit, or favorite a product.

removeFromWishlist.label: Remove from wishlist
removeFromWishlist.description: Remove a product from the current customer's wishlist.

toggleWishlist.label: Toggle wishlist
toggleWishlist.description: Toggle a product in the current customer's wishlist. If it is already saved, remove it; otherwise add it.

clearWishlist.label: Clear wishlist
clearWishlist.description: Clear the current customer's entire wishlist. Only execute after the customer clearly confirms.

searchPolicies.label: Search policies/FAQ
searchPolicies.description: Search FAQ, return policy, privacy policy, and terms content managed by admins. Use for questions about rules, returns, refunds, privacy, accounts, or terms.

getReturnPolicy.label: Return policy
getReturnPolicy.description: Get the admin-managed return/refund policy. Can filter by the customer's topic.

getPrivacyPolicy.label: Privacy policy
getPrivacyPolicy.description: Get the admin-managed privacy policy for questions about personal data, cookies, account security, or privacy rights.

getTermsOfService.label: Terms of service
getTermsOfService.description: Get the admin-managed terms of service for questions about site rules, accounts, responsibilities, restrictions, or purchase terms.

getFAQ.label: FAQ
getFAQ.description: Get admin-managed frequently asked questions. Can search by the customer's question.

searchBlogPosts.label: Blog posts
searchBlogPosts.description: Search published blog posts by keyword, category, or tag so the agent can advise from existing content.

getBuyingGuides.label: Buying guides
getBuyingGuides.description: Get the shopping guide content from website config for questions about buying flow, payment, order tracking, and shopping tips.

browseByCategory.label: Browse by category
browseByCategory.description: Browse products by category or topic. Use when customers ask broadly about an area or want suggestions.

getPersonalizedRecommendations.label: Personalized recommendations
getPersonalizedRecommendations.description: Get product recommendations from the recommendations system. Use when customers want suitable product advice; prefer this over popular products unless they specifically ask for best sellers.

getRecentViewedProducts.label: Recently viewed products
getRecentViewedProducts.description: Get products the customer recently viewed plus related suggestions for context-aware product advice.

getRelatedProducts.label: Related products
getRelatedProducts.description: Get related products based on a product the customer is viewing or asking about. Use to suggest similar options after the source product is identified.

getPopularProducts.label: Popular products
getPopularProducts.description: Get the best-selling or most-liked products. Use when customers ask for best sellers or quick recommendations.

getProductReviewSummary.label: Product review summary
getProductReviewSummary.description: Get the average rating, total review count, and selected review highlights for a product by name or slug.

getProductReviews.label: Product reviews
getProductReviews.description: Get the real public review list for a product by rating, sort, page, and limit.

createReview.label: Create product review
createReview.description: Create a public text review for a purchased product after clear customer confirmation.

updateReview.label: Update product review
updateReview.description: Edit the signed-in customer's own product review after clear confirmation.

deleteReview.label: Delete product review
deleteReview.description: Delete the signed-in customer's own product review after clear confirmation.

voteReview.label: Vote helpful review
voteReview.description: Toggle a helpful vote on another customer's public review after confirmation.

getStoreConfig.label: Store configuration
getStoreConfig.description: Get store identity and contact details from website configuration.

getSupportInfo.label: Support info
getSupportInfo.description: Get support phone, email, hours, website, and social links from website configuration.

getStoreLocations.label: Store locations
getStoreLocations.description: Get store addresses, branches, pickup points, and map links from website configuration.

submitContactRequest.label: Submit contact request
submitContactRequest.description: Create a support contact request when a customer leaves an email or phone number and wants help outside the chat.

scheduleCallback.label: Schedule callback
scheduleCallback.description: Schedule a staff callback for the customer using their phone number and preferred time window.

createSupportTicket.label: Create support ticket
createSupportTicket.description: Create an asynchronous support ticket with category and priority for staff follow-up.

getSupportTicketStatus.label: Check ticket status
getSupportTicketStatus.description: Check the status of a support ticket created by the chatbot using its ticket ID.

reportBugOrIssue.label: Report bug or issue
reportBugOrIssue.description: Record a website, payment, product, or order issue from chat for staff follow-up.

getRefundStatus.label: Check refund/return status
getRefundStatus.description: Check the status of a recorded return, exchange, or refund request on an order.

requestReturnOrRefund.label: Request return/refund
requestReturnOrRefund.description: Create a return, exchange, or refund support ticket from chat after clear customer confirmation.

handoffToHuman.label: Handoff to human
handoffToHuman.description: Let the AI transfer the conversation to a support agent and record a specific escalation reason.

requestHumanAgent.label: Request human agent
requestHumanAgent.description: Alias of handoffToHuman. Use when the conversation needs a real support agent to take over.
